programme.title: Modernism, Inc.: The Eliot Noyes Design Story.
programme.desc: The life and work of an influential mid-century architect. 2023. USA. Director: Jason Cohn, Sebastian Roche, Katrina Alcorn, Gordon Bruce.

programme.title: Bolero
programme.desc: In 1928 Paris, a composer struggles to find inspiration, revisiting his life to create the masterpiece. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Anne Fontaine. Starring: Raphael Personnaz, Doria Tiller.

programme.title: Crooked Earth
programme.desc: Forces of tradition and tribal pride collide with government authority. 2001. New Zealand. Director: Sam Pilsbury. Starring: Temuera Morrison, Lawrence Makoare, Jaime Passier-Armstrong.

programme.title: Flavors Of Iraq
programme.desc: A French-Iraqi journalist reflects on his father's journey from Iraq to France following his passing . 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Leonard Cohen.

programme.title: Within The Pines
programme.desc: Sound recordist, Sam Evans, is recording in a remote forrest when he hears a blood curdling scream. 2024. Australia. Director: Paul Evans Thomas. Starring: Brendan Cooney, Barrie Cotton.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man is haunted by an evil force that threatens to tear his life apart. 2023. Iceland. Director: Arro Stefansson. Starring: Hjortur Johann Jonsson, Heiddis Chadwick Hlynsdottir.

programme.title: Total Control
programme.desc: 2/1. Far from home, Alex faces the reality of her alliance with the opposition and begins to question her future. 2021. Australia. Director: Wayne Blair. Starring: Rachel Griffiths.

programme.title: Total Control
programme.desc: 2/2. Rachel makes a surprise announcement that sees her facing off with Alex on live television. 2021. Australia. Director: Wayne Blair. Starring: Rachel Griffiths, Deborah Mailman.

programme.title: Total Control
programme.desc: 2/3. Alex's success on the trail has caught the attention of Jack Ramsay and he's not going down without a fight. 2021. Australia. Director: Wayne Blair. Starring: Rachel Griffiths.

programme.title: Total Control
programme.desc: 2/4. It's the day of the election, but a family emergency sends the campaign into chaos. 2021. Australia. Director: Wayne Blair. Starring: Rachel Griffiths, Deborah Mailman.

programme.title: Total Control
programme.desc: 2/5. The high stakes horse-trading begins as Alex and a group of Independents meet to decide the future of the nation. 2021. Australia. Director: Wayne Blair. Starring: Rachel Griffiths.

programme.title: Total Control
programme.desc: 2/6. As Alex is on the cusp of rewriting history the forces of violence and reaction make one last attempt to stop her. 2021. Australia. Director: Wayne Blair. Starring: Rachel Griffiths.

programme.title: Code Unknown
programme.desc: A careless act of littering entangles three strangers, leading to one of them being deported. 2000. France, Germany. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Juliette Binoche, Thierry Neuvic.
